metadata.description: Legal and compliance requirements for European CV standards and data protection

gdpr_compliance.principle: Personal data must be processed lawfully and transparently

data_minimization.rule: Only include personal data necessary for job application
data_minimization.apply_to: All CVs created by this agent

implications.assessment: Not necessary unless explicitly required by employer

implications.exception: Only if job-critical (e.g., occupational physician role)

special_category_data.definition: Data revealing racial/ethnic origin, political opinions, religious beliefs, trade union membership, genetic data, biometric data, health status, sex life/sexual orientation

right_to_erasure.note: CVs created by this agent contain no unnecessary tracking or persistent identifiers; users can request removal at any time

europass_requirements.scope: Recognized across all EU Member States and most countries worldwide

language_of_cv.recommendation: Use language of target job market
language_of_cv.guidance: If applying in Germany, CV can be in German or English; Spanish positions accept Spanish or English, etc.
language_of_cv.multi_language_option: Can provide both EU and local variants per country

country_specific_considerations.note: Europass applies globally, but some countries have local preferences

eu_countries.variations: Some countries have minor formatting preferences but Europass is universally accepted

non_eu_remote.note: Remote applicants from non-EU countries can use this agent without modification

key_countries.note: Europass standard; CV slightly longer than FR/ES is acceptable
Europass standard; traditional CV (Curriculum Vitae) format very common
Europass standard; often includes brief motivation letter
Europass standard; very formal and structured expected
Europass standard; often prefer concise, data-driven format

age_discrimination_prevention.principle: CVs should not reveal or emphasize age to prevent age-based screening
prohibited: Graduation years older than 20 years (unless directly relevant)
chronological_dates_ok: Educational graduation year (only if recent or highly relevant)

example_problem.good: Senior engineer with extensive enterprise software delivery

disability_and_inclusion.principle: CVs should include accommodation needs only if strategically relevant

guidelines.scenario: Applicant has disability requiring workplace accommodation
guidelines.recommendation: Do NOT disclose in CV; disclose to HR after job offer or during onboarding

guidelines.scenario: Applicant's disability is visible or directly job-relevant
guidelines.recommendation: Can be mentioned in 'Additional Information' section if desired

military_service.applicability: Some EU countries (France, Spain, Germany historically) required conscription
military_service.current_practice: Include only if recent and strategically relevant to demonstrate discipline or specific training

driving_licence.inclusion_rule: Include ONLY if required by job description
driving_licence.example_relevant: Logistics coordinator, delivery driver, field technician
driving_licence.example_irrelevant: Software engineer, data analyst (do not include unless specified)

eu_terminology.notation: CDI (Contrat à Durée Indéterminée) in French, unbefristeter Vertrag in German
CDD in French, befristeter Vertrag in German

employment_contract_types.disclosure: Can include contract type for clarity; no negative judgment attached

remote_work_notation.current_status: Remote work is normalized and fully accepted across EU
remote_work_notation.notation: List workplace as 'Remote' or 'Remote (EU-based)' if applicable
remote_work_notation.no_stigma: Remote positions are equally valued; no requirement to declare relocation intent

certification_verification.rule: Only include certifications from recognized bodies
accepted: Professional certifications (AWS, Google Cloud, Microsoft, etc.)
scrutinized: Online courses without formal accreditation (optional to include)
In-house training programs (list as 'Professional Development' only)
certification_verification.removal_rule: Certifications from non-verifiable sources will be flagged

regulated_professions.requirement: Must declare relevant board certifications and licenses
Must certify bar association membership and registration
Compliance certifications (MiFID, CySEC, etc.) must be current
Teaching credentials and accreditation must be clearly stated

check_1.name: GDPR Data Minimization
check_1.rule: Ensure only necessary personal data is included
check_1.action: Flag and remove unnecessary personal data

check_3.name: Age Discrimination Prevention
check_3.action: Flag for review and removal suggestion

check_4.name: Europass Compliance
check_4.action: Reject and request restructuring if non-compliant

check_5.name: Certification Verification
check_5.action: Flag suspicious certifications for user review
